name: UMH Properties Inc. 6.375% Series D Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock Liquidation Preference $25 per share
summary: UMH Properties Inc. 6.375% Series D Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock is a preferred equity offering from UMH Properties, a REIT that owns and operates manufactured home communities. These shares pay a fixed dividend and have priority over common stock in the event of liquidation. UMH Properties is headquartered in Freehold, New Jersey.
